column.name: systolic
column.description: Systolic BP component (LOINC 8480-6). .first() — assumes one systolic per BP panel; if a single observation has multiple matching components (series of readings or duplicates), we pick the first by document order. For clinically rigorous aggregation (avg/max/last), use a custom transformation downstream.

column.name: diastolic
column.description: Diastolic BP component (LOINC 8462-4). .first() — see systolic for assumption details.
